title: QR Code Order
description: This website is an online ordering and digital menu platform for HokBen (Hoka Hoka Bento) restaurants, typically accessed by scanning a QR code at the dining table for contactless dine-in or take-away orders.

title: Mobile POS HokBen
description: This is an enterprise-grade Mobile Point of Sale (POS) application deployed across more than 350 HokBen stores to streamline tableside ordering, speed up transactions, and seamlessly sync real-time sales and inventory data with the central system.

title: Digital Kiosk & Drive Thru HokBen
description: An integrated digital ecosystem comprising a Mobile POS deployed across 350+ stores, self-service Digital Kiosks, and an efficient Drive-Thru system—all working together to streamline restaurant operations, accelerate transaction times, and enhance the overall customer ordering experience.

title: Packer and Customer Display HokBen
description: An end-to-end kitchen and order management ecosystem consisting of Kitchen Displays for automated meal preparation tracking, Packer Displays for accurate food assembly and verification, and Customer Displays to provide real-time order status updates to waiting guests and delivery riders.

title: Survey & Feedback Customer
description: This is a dedicated web portal for HokBen’s customer satisfaction survey and feedback system, designed to gather direct insights from guests regarding their dining experience and service quality.

title: PUSKURJAR
description: This is the official portal for the Center for Curriculum and Learning (Pusat Kurikulum dan Pembelajaran) under the Ministry of Primary and Secondary Education of Indonesia, serving as a hub for national curriculum information, teaching resources, and educational guidelines for schools and educators.

title: CSAN
description: A high-performance, SEO-optimized web application built with modern frameworks to showcase technical expertise. Report Management and Sales.

title: Sales Force Automation (SFA) Mobile App
description: A high-performance mobile application built with modern frameworks to showcase technical expertise.

title: Company Profile - PT Timur Terang Transindo
description: A high-performance web application built with modern frameworks to showcase technical expertise.

title: Transport Management System - PT Timur Terang Transindo
description: This is a proprietary Transport Management System (TMS) designed to streamline, track, and manage the logistics, planner, fleet operations, and cargo delivery services for PT Timur Terang Transindo.

title: Hot Spot Report WEB
description: The website serves as a web-based catalog or sub-directory for browsing and accessing MODIS (Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer) satellite datasets and products.

title: Lombok Mini Soccer
description: This website is an online booking and information platform for a mini soccer sports venue or community hub located in Lombok, Indonesia
